summary: Tested Salary Consistency and Mentor Leaderboard fixes. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Mentor Dashboard shows correct salary (AED 5,000) in Bonus Progress card, Mentor Leaderboard shows effort-based ranking with correct columns (Rank, Mentor, Students, Deposits, Effort USD/AED, Bonus Tier). Period filter works (monthly/quarterly/yearly/all_time).
passed_tests: Both endpoints return identical salary values (5000 AED)
Leaderboard has required fields: mentor_id, mentor_name, total_effort_usd, total_effort_aed, deposit_count, bonus_tier, rank, total_students
Leaderboard does NOT have old fields: upgrades, commission, satisfaction_score, score
Leaderboard period filter works for monthly
Leaderboard period filter works for quarterly
Leaderboard period filter works for yearly
Leaderboard period filter works for all_time
Edwin's salary correctly computed from salary_structure components (2000+1750+1250=5000)
Frontend Mentor Dashboard shows Base Salary: AED 5,000
Frontend Mentor Dashboard shows Current Bonus: AED 500 (10% of salary)
Frontend Leaderboard shows podium with Effort USD, AED, Deposits, Students, Bonus Tier
Frontend Leaderboard table has columns: Rank, Mentor, Students, Deposits, Effort (USD), Effort (AED), Bonus Tier
Frontend Leaderboard period filter dropdown works
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 8645-8664: _get_employee_salary_aed helper correctly prioritizes: 1) top-level salary, 2) computed from salary_structure components, 3) fallback to gross/net
server.py lines 8470-8478: Mentor dashboard correctly uses _get_employee_salary_aed for individual view
server.py lines 8845-8847: Effort-summary correctly uses _get_employee_salary_aed for salary field
server.py lines 17342-17436: Mentor leaderboard correctly ranks by total_effort_usd (own deposits + cross-mentor deposits)
server.py lines 17375-17392: Aggregation pipeline uses $addFields to compute effective_effort_by (effort_by_id if set, else mentor_id)
MentorLeaderboard.jsx: Correctly displays effort-based ranking with new columns (no upgrades/commission/satisfaction)
MentorDashboardPage.jsx lines 232-236: Bonus Progress card correctly shows salary_aed from bonus object
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Salary consistency and Mentor Leaderboard fixes verified. Key points: (1) _get_employee_salary_aed helper prioritizes top-level salary > computed from structure > gross/net fallback, (2) Edwin's salary is 5000 AED (computed from salary_structure: 2000+1750+1250), (3) Leaderboard ranks by total_effort_usd (own + cross-mentor deposits), (4) Old leaderboard columns (upgrades/commission/satisfaction) removed, replaced with effort-based columns.

salary_consistency.source: Computed from salary_structure components (basic_salary=2000 + housing_allowance=1750 + transport_allowance=1250)
